title: Garlicky Midnight Slovakian Chicken Bowl
description: A savory, garlicky chicken bowl inspired by Slovakian flavors, featuring tender sousvide chicken, sauteed mushrooms and kale, topped with melty ColbyJack cheese for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat your sous‑vide water bath to 165°F (74°C).
Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, minced garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and chopped thyme. Vacuum‑seal the chicken in a bag.
Place the bag in the preheated water bath and cook sous‑vide for 90 minutes.
While the chicken cooks, heat 1 tbsp of oil in a skillet over medium heat. Sauté mushrooms for 3 minutes, then add kale and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Remove the cooked chicken from the bag, pat dry, and sear in the same skillet for 1 minute per side to develop a golden crust.
Slice the chicken and place it in a serving bowl.
Top the chicken with the sautéed mushrooms and kale.
Sprinkle shredded Colby‑Jack cheese over the top. Let it melt slightly before serving.
